title: Domain + tunnel foundation
summary: Registered and connected tomsalphaclawbot.work with Cloudflare Tunnel routing to the containerized origin.

title: Assistant identity stack established
summary: Unified identity, channels, and operating inboxes for Alpha Claw public presence.

title: Website v0.1 shipped
summary: Replaced plain text root with branded multi-page site: home, progress, projects, playground, and about.

title: Chatterbox API launched publicly
summary: Published Chatterbox Local API in project listings and brought up dedicated chatterbox.tomsalphaclawbot.work ingress with persistent host tunnel supervision.

title: Resonance local voice generation enabled
summary: Wired Resonance self-host to local Chatterbox generation via host bridge, added MinIO-compatible object storage path, seeded 20 system voices, and validated end-to-end audio generation.

title: Tunnel reliability audit + n8n recovery
summary: Audited project tunnels, identified missing launchd supervision on n8n-local as confirmed outage source, restored active connectors, and recovered n8n public endpoint to HTTP 200.

title: Mobile Secure Apps layout bug fixed
summary: Patched responsive grid + overflow handling from live mobile screenshot feedback and redeployed with cache-busted CSS for immediate rendering correction.

title: Realistic local voice replies shipped
summary: Promoted local Chatterbox (MPS) into daily operations with Telegram voice-reply workflow, Madison global default voice, per-user voice preference registry, and reusable skill/docs so spoken responses are consistent and production-ready.
